description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular structure with a rich, dark wood grain finish on the top, sides, and drawer front, contrasted by a smooth, light-colored frame. The front includes a single, wide drawer with a prominent horizontal bar pull handle, and an open shelf space above the drawer for additional storage or display. The wood grain pattern is visually striking, running horizontally across the top and vertically down the sides, giving the piece a modern yet natural aesthetic. The legs are straight and metallic, providing sturdy support and a contemporary touch. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements beyond the natural wood pattern. This nightstand would fit seamlessly in urban environments, such as modern apartments or lofts, especially when placed beside a bed or against a wall.
description: A modern nightstand with a dark wood grain finish, a single drawer with a bar pull handle, an open shelf, and metallic legs. Its minimalist design features clean lines and a striking wood pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf, single drawer with a bar pull handle, and the wood grain top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous wood grain pattern and the solid, light-colored frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wood grain surface and the back of the frame and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same wood grain and frame details as the other side.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
